_documentation: Data source for /board.html. The page template (src/board.njk) loops over `members` and `support`. New people, role changes, photo swaps — edit this file, not the template. A future workflow will overwrite this file from the linked Google Sheet (see docs/board-bios-setup.md once added).

members.name: Dr Hugo Meijer
members.affiliation: CNRS Research Fellow — Sciences Po, Center for International Studies (CERI).
members.themes: International Relations, Foreign Policy Analysis, Security Studies, Alliances.

members.name: Dr Marie Robin
members.affiliation: Assistant Professor of War Studies — Leiden University.
members.themes: Revenge in international relations, Strategic use of emotions, Evolution of conflictuality, Ethics of war.

members.name: Prof. Moritz Weiss
members.affiliation: Senior Lecturer and Principal Investigator — Ludwig Maximilian University of Munich.
members.themes: International Relations, Theorizing (informal) institutions, European integration, Governance of international security.

members.name: Prof. Silvia D’Amato
members.themes: Terrorism, Political Violence and War, Peace and Justice.

members.name: Dr Julia Carver
members.themes: Foreign policymaking, Strategic concepts, Emerging digital technologies.

members.name: Prof. Marco Wyss
members.affiliation: Professor of International History and Security — Lancaster University; Research Fellow — Stellenbosch University; Senior Research Fellow — School of Advanced Study, University of London.
members.themes: Cold War, African and European defence, Neutrality.

members.name: Dr Eliza Gheorghe
members.affiliation: Assistant Professor — Department of International Relations, Bilkent University.
members.themes: International Relations Theory, International Security, Nuclear Politics.

members.name: Prof. Marina Henke
members.affiliation: Professor of International Relations and Director of the Centre for International Security — Hertie School.
members.themes: Intervention decision-making, Nuclear security, U.S. and European Grand Strategy.

members.name: Dr Sanne Verschuren
members.affiliation: Assistant Professor of International Security — Boston University.
members.themes: Domestic determinants of security policy, Role of ideas, norms, and institutions in national security decision-making.

members.name: Prof. Revecca Pedi
members.affiliation: Associate Professor of International Relations — University of Macedonia.
members.themes: International relations of small states, Theories of international relations, International relations and the European Union.

members.name: Dr Chiara Libiseller
members.affiliation: Lecturer in Strategic Studies — King’s College London.
members.themes: Knowledge production on war, Changing character of war, Impact of technology on the theory and practice of war.

members.name: Alisa Kerschbaum
members.affiliation: Research Grant Advisor — University of Amsterdam.
members.themes: Global affairs, International Peace & Security, Environmental security.

members.name: Prof. Nicolas Blarel
members.affiliation: Associate Professor of International Relations and Director of Studies — Leiden University.
members.themes: Foreign Policy Analysis, Politics of migration governance, International politics of South Asia.

members.name: Prof. Antonio Calcara
members.themes: European Security and Defence, Defence Industry, Political Economy.

members.name: Prof. Olivier Schmitt
members.affiliation: Head of Research — Institute for Military Operations at the Royal Danish Defence College.

members.name: Prof. Chiara Ruffa
members.affiliation: Professor of Political Science — Sciences Po, Center for International Studies (CERI).
members.themes: Multilateralism on the ground, Peacekeeping, Civil-military relations, Political sociology, Fieldwork.

members.name: Dr Tim Sweijs
members.affiliation: Senior Research Fellow — Netherlands’ War Studies Research Centre; Director of Research — The Hague Centre for Strategic Studies.
members.themes: Warfare (past, present, future), Strategy, Coercion, Deterrence, Emerging technologies.

members.name: Prof. Filip Ejdus
members.affiliation: Professor of Security Studies — Faculty of Political Science, University of Belgrade.
members.themes: Identity, memory, and emotions, International interventions, Civil-military relations, Security sector reform.

members.name: Sarka Kolmasova
members.affiliation: Deputy Head & Assistant Professor — Department of International Relations and European Studies, Metropolitan University Prague.
members.themes: Norms, Military Interventions, Responsibility to Protect, Human Rights in International Politics.

support.name: Dr Arthur PB Laudrain
support.bio: Arthur is responsible for most of the online logistics of the organisation. He is Team Lead and a Senior Researcher for Cyber Security at the Center for Security Studies at ETH Zurich. Arthur has been with us since 2017.

support.name: Dr John NT Helferich
support.bio: John is your first point of contact. He is in charge of our email communications, and ensures smooth coordination between chairs and panel members, among other things. He is a DPhil candidate in International Relations at St. Antony's College, Oxford. John joined the Initiative in 2018.

support.name: Eugenio Sanchez
support.bio: Eugenio assists with the development of our communication strategy and the logistics of our events. He is a PhD candidate in International Relations at Sciences Po Paris. Eugenio joined the Initiative in 2023.
